2026-04-15T17:08:34.8566549Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8567466Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8568459Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8569359Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8569881Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8570285Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8570592Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8570905Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8571215Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8571632Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8572012Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8572510Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-15T17:08:34.8572943Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-15T17:12:01.9975881Z   3. `SearchAlias` - not in README

2026-04-15T17:12:01.9984532Z 
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9985150Z ◆ Now I have a clear picture of the documentation gaps. The `Azure.Search.Documents` package 12.0.0 added major new features that are not documented in the main README:
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9985790Z   
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9986575Z   1. **`KnowledgeBaseRetrievalClient`** - A completely new client for agentic retrieval operations. The samples directory has documentation (Sample10, 11, 12), but the main README's "Examples" section doesn't mention it at all.
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9987418Z   
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9988113Z   2. **Image-based vector search** (`VectorizableImageBinaryQuery`, `VectorizableImageUrlQuery`) - No mention in the README.
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9988636Z   
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9988894Z   3. **`SearchAlias`** - Index alias management - not documented in README.
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9989223Z   
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9989365Z   
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9990302Z   4. **New DI/IConfiguration support** - The README only shows the old `AddSearchClient` pattern, missing the new settings-based approach with `SearchClientSettings`, `SearchIndexClientSettings`, `SearchIndexerClientSettings`, and `KnowledgeBaseRetrievalClientSettings`.
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9991657Z   5. **New AI skills** (`ChatCompletionSkill`, `ContentUnderstandingSkill`, `DocumentIntelligenceLayoutSkill`) - Also undocumented.
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9992189Z   
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9992585Z   I should check what sample files exist to understand what documentation I can reference for these new features.
2026-04-15T17:12:01.9992990Z
